title: Genie Code now supports auto-approve for tool actions ​
body:
**June 4, 2026**

Genie Code now offers an auto-approve mode that approves tool actions, like running code or editing notebooks, without prompting you for each request. An AI classifier reviews each action and blocks risky ones. Auto-approve is a productivity feature, not a security boundary. Databricks recommends keeping it off when working with production data or shared resources. See [Approve tool actions](/aws/en/genie-code/use-genie-code#approve-tools).
